title: Clinical and genetic findings in a Chinese cohort with choroideremia.
author: Song Y Chen C Xie Y Sun T Xu K Li Y
content:
S-EPMC9905080 PMC9905080 Clinical and genetic findings in a Chinese cohort with choroideremia.

Objective

Choroideremia (CHM) is an X-linked chorioretinal dystrophy caused by variants in the CHM gene. The aim of this study was to report the clinical and genetic features of a cohort
